events.text: Carlos Sánchez (Colombia) is shown the red card.
Goal!  Colombia 0, Japan 1. Shinji Kagawa (Japan) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the centre of the goal.
Goal!  Colombia 1, Japan 1. Juan Fernando Quintero (Colombia) from a free kick with a left footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Wílmar Barrios (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Colombia 1, Japan 2. Yuya Osako (Japan) header from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Keisuke Honda with a cross   following a corner.
James Rodríguez (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Eiji Kawashima (Japan) is shown the yellow card.
